scenes.title: The Visitor
scenes.background_prompt: A sandy beach with tide pools nearby, a tall sandcastle with two towers and a moat in the foreground. Sunny afternoon. No people, no animals.
scenes.full_scene_prompt: A sandy beach on a sunny afternoon. A girl in a sun hat is walking back from the tide pools carrying a small bucket of water. A younger boy in green swim shorts kneels next to a tall sandcastle with two towers and a moat, looking the other way. A large gray crab has come out of a tide pool and is digging into the base of one tower. The boy does not see the crab.

CH: younger boy in green swim shorts
A: crab comes out of tide pool
crab digs into base of tower
